requirement_topic.en: DGSM / MoCIIP Standards Screening for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: DGSM / MoCIIP 光伏逆变器标准筛查
requirement_topic.zht: DGSM / MoCIIP 光伏逆變器標準篩查

summary.en: Oman standards and conformity questions should be screened through the Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion and its Directorate General for Standards and Metrology for the exact inverter model, HS code, voltage class, communications options, and import or project route. A standard may be voluntary in general but become mandatory when cited by Oman regulation, customs practice, tender, grid-connection approval, buyer contract, financing, insurance, or project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 应通过阿曼商业、工业和投资促进部及其标准与计量总局，按准确逆变器型号、HS 编码、电压等级、通信选项以及进口或项目路径筛查标准和合格评定问题。标准一般可能是自愿的，但一旦被阿曼法规、海关实践、招标、并网批准、买方合同、融资、保险或项目业主要求引用，即可能成为强制要求。
summary.zht: 應通過阿曼商業、工業和投資促進部及其標準與計量總局，按準確逆變器型號、HS 編碼、電壓等級、通訊選項以及進口或專案路徑篩查標準和合格評定問題。標準一般可能是自願的，但一旦被阿曼法規、海關實務、招標、併網批准、買方合同、融資、保險或專案業主要求引用，即可能成為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: MoCIIP / DGSM applicable Oman standards and technical regulations
DGSM standards and metrology conformity route for the exact product scope
Project tender or buyer-specified PV inverter standards

summary.en: China-origin files may include GB/T 37408 reports, GB/T 19964 project-grid evidence, NB/T 32004 reports, CQC or CGC certificates, IEC CB certificates, Chinese labels, and Chinese manuals. These are technical inputs but do not by themselves prove Oman standards applicability or import acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国产文件可能包括 GB/T 37408 报告、GB/T 19964 项目并网证据、NB/T 32004 报告、CQC 或 CGC 证书、IEC CB 证书、中文标签和中文说明书。这些属于技术输入，但其本身不能证明阿曼标准适用性或进口接受。
summary.zht: 中國產文件可能包括 GB/T 37408 報告、GB/T 19964 專案併網證據、NB/T 32004 報告、CQC 或 CGC 證書、IEC CB 證書、中文標籤和中文說明書。這些屬於技術輸入，但其本身不能證明阿曼標準適用性或進口接受。

standards_or_laws: IEC CB Scheme reports where held

gap.en: Prepare an Oman standards-applicability note, model-family list, HS-code note, certificates and test reports, critical-component list, nameplate and manual samples, and a clause crosswalk showing which China or IEC documents support the Oman route.
gap.zh: 应准备阿曼标准适用性说明、型号系列清单、HS 编码说明、证书和测试报告、关键零部件清单、铭牌和说明书样件，以及说明中国或 IEC 文件如何支持阿曼路径的条款对照表。
gap.zht: 應準備阿曼標準適用性說明、型號系列清單、HS 編碼說明、證書和測試報告、關鍵零部件清單、銘牌和說明書樣件，以及說明中國或 IEC 文件如何支持阿曼路徑的條款對照表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where incorporated by Oman technical regulation, customs or conformity route, tender, buyer contract, financing, insurance, or grid-connection approval; otherwise standards screening remains a due-diligence item
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC evidence is not automatically accepted in Oman unless the Oman authority, buyer, utility, or project route accepts it or accepts mapped equivalence

source.publisher: Oman Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion (MoCIIP)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat DGSM / MoCIIP applicability as a product-scope question. China reports should be mapped to the Oman import, tender, and project route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 DGSM / MoCIIP 适用性作为产品范围问题处理。出货前应将中国报告映射到阿曼进口、招标和项目路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 DGSM / MoCIIP 適用性作為產品範圍問題處理。出貨前應將中國報告映射到阿曼進口、招標和專案路徑。
